data.body:
[operator-attested] external-integration workflow re-run GREEN on main (a91917b65): GitHub Actions run 29306638680 (https://github.com/navapbc/rebar/actions/runs/29306638680) — 25 passed, 1 skipped, 1 xfailed, 0 failed. test_link_sync_differ_apply_roundtrip_live now passes against live Jira.

Landed as three stacked Gerrit changes (all merged to main):
- #672 get_baseline (33f0a7ed2)
- #674 is_pending + recover_pending_bindings (912ac7831)
- #677 apply-leaf assertion updated to post-33d0 contract (a91917b65)
The stub interface gaps + the stale links_applied assertion are all resolved; the authoritative live get_issue_links link-existence check is retained.
